{{Infobox character
| name = Fallen Leaf Jade
| introduced = [[Bloodline (novel)|Bloodline]]
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Fallen Leaf Jade]] is a woman with gray in her hair who uses a staff to channel [[life madra]].}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
